final:
module top_module(input wire dtr,
                 input wire rts,
                 input wire rx,
                 output wire tx,
                 output wire D1,
                 output wire D2);assign D1 = dtr;
assign D2 = rts;


assign tx = rx;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      D1 <= ~dtr; D2 <= ~rts; tx <= ~rx;
    end
  end

endmodule
